name: Frosted Glass
description: The phosphor-shell frosted panel look over a real blur. The scene behind the surface is blurred, tinted, and textured with a slowly drifting crystalline grain, with a soft vignette toward the edges. Where no scene exists behind the surface (OSDs and popups) it falls back to the original translucent tint.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Blur radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene behind the surface is blurred (px)

parameters.name: Grain amount
parameters.description: Strength of the crystalline frost grain

parameters.name: Grain drift
parameters.description: How quickly the fine frost detail drifts, where 0 freezes it

parameters.name: Tint strength
parameters.description: How much of the tint colour is mixed over the blurred scene

parameters.name: Vignette
parameters.description: How much the pane darkens toward its edges

parameters.name: Tint colour
parameters.description: Colour mixed over the blurred scene
